title: Quick Math 60
description: 60-second arithmetic rush! Build exam-level speed calculation for SSC, Banking, Railways. 4 difficulty levels from Easy to Expert.
controls: Tap the correct option. Build combos for bonus points.

title: Sudoku Pro
description: Classic 9x9 Sudoku with 4 difficulty levels. Features hints, pencil marks, mistake counter, and auto-save. Train your logical reasoning.
controls: Tap a cell, then tap a number 1-9. Use pencil mode for notes.

title: GK Blitz
description: 260+ verified General Knowledge MCQs for UPSC, SSC, Banking exams. Pick a category: History, Geography, Polity, Economy, Science, Culture.
controls: Tap the correct option. Blitz mode: 60s. Practice mode: explanations shown.

title: Number Ninja
description: Find the next number in the pattern! Arithmetic, geometric, squared, and complex series. Essential for Bank PO and SSC quant sections.
controls: Tap the correct answer. 15 seconds per question, 10 questions per round.

title: Code Cracker
description: Decode letter-number patterns and ciphers. Direct practice for SSC and Banking reasoning sections. 11 pattern types from Caesar to positional sums.
controls: Analyze the pattern, tap the correct answer. Keyboard shortcuts 1-4 / A-D supported.

title: Memory Master
description: Train your working memory across 3 modes: Digit Span, Pattern Grid, Sequence. Critical skill for Data Interpretation and complex problem-solving.
controls: Memorize the sequence, then reproduce it. Length grows each round.

title: Word Groups
description: Group 16 words into 4 themed categories. 30 hand-crafted puzzles covering grammar, GK, vocabulary, and more. NYT Connections style.
controls: Tap 4 words that belong together, then SUBMIT. 4 mistakes allowed per puzzle.

title: Word Wise
description: Master exam vocabulary: Synonyms, Antonyms, and Analogies. 419 hand-curated word pairs targeting SSC, Banking, and UPSC English section.
controls: Tap the matching word. 10-18 seconds per question depending on difficulty.

title: India Map Master
description: Master Indian Geography with 4 modes: States, Capitals, Rivers, and Neighbors. Critical for UPSC Prelims and SSC GK sections.
controls: Read the clue, tap the correct state. 20 seconds per question.

title: Mini Crossword
description: Daily 5x5 crossword with Indian GK and vocabulary themed clues. 15 puzzles, solve in 1-3 minutes. Build vocab + GK simultaneously.
controls: Tap a cell, use the on-screen keyboard. Tap clues to jump. Reveal up to 3 letters.

title: True or False
description: Rapid-fire 60-second GK challenge. 210+ verified statements across History, Geography, Polity, Science, Sports. Wrong answer = time penalty!
controls: Tap TRUE (left) or FALSE (right). 10-second-per-question limit.

title: Odd One Out
description: Find the item that doesn't belong! 400+ classification puzzles across 34 categories. Pure reasoning practice for SSC and Bank PO.
controls: Tap the odd item. 10 seconds per question, streak bonuses up to ×3.

title: DI Drill
description: Speed-drill Data Interpretation questions. Bar charts, pie charts, tables, line graphs. Worth 15-25% marks in Bank PO, SSC, CAT exams.
controls: Analyze the chart, tap the correct answer. 30 seconds per question.

title: Constitution Quest
description: Drag Indian Constitution articles to their correct Parts. 40 verified articles across 9 Parts. Made for UPSC, Polity students!
controls: Drag the article card down to the correct Part of the Constitution.

title: Timeline Rush
description: Order Indian history events chronologically. 240 verified events across 5 eras: Ancient, Medieval, Modern, Freedom Struggle, Post-Independence.
controls: Drag events into correct chronological order (oldest at top).

title: Scheme Match
description: Memory-match game with 68 verified government schemes. Learn PMJDY, MGNREGA, Ayushman Bharat, PMAY and more across 9 categories.
controls: Tap a scheme name card, then its matching description card. Match all pairs!

title: PM Quest
description: Connect Indian Prime Ministers to their iconic acts, events, and quotes. 13 PMs, 95 verified items, 4 modes (Acts/Tenure/Quotes/Events).
controls: Tap a PM, then tap the matching item to draw a connection line.

title: Fruit Slice Master
description: Slice flying fruits with lightning-fast swipes! Juicy physics, combo multipliers, and explosive bombs. 100% original HTML5 game.
controls: Swipe or click and drag to slice fruits. Avoid bombs!

title: Snake.Go
description: A neon retro snake reimagined! Glide across a pixel grid, eat glowing apples, and grow longer. Mobile-friendly with swipe controls.
controls: Arrow keys or swipe to change direction

title: Pixel Flap
description: Tap to flap your wings and weave through endless pipes! Classic side-scroller with pixel-art charm and buttery-smooth physics.
controls: Tap / Click / Space to flap

title: Coin Catcher
description: Catch falling coins and gems in your basket while dodging bombs! Build combos for massive score multipliers.
controls: Drag or Arrow keys to move the basket

title: Brick Smash
description: Smash through colorful neon bricks with a bouncing ball. Progress through levels with increasing difficulty and multi-hit bricks.
controls: Drag or Arrow keys to move paddle. Tap / Space to launch.

title: 2048 Merge
description: Slide and merge numbered tiles to reach 2048! The iconic addictive puzzle with silky-smooth swipe controls.
controls: Arrow keys or swipe to slide tiles

title: Memory Flip
description: Flip cards and match pairs to clear the board. Choose 4x4 or 6x6 difficulty and beat your best time.
controls: Tap or click cards to flip and match pairs

title: Neon Blaster
description: Top-down neon space shooter! Blast through waves of enemy ships, dodge incoming fire, and survive as long as possible.
controls: Drag or WASD/Arrows to move. Auto-fire enabled.

title: Color Sort
description: Sort colored liquids into matching tubes! A relaxing yet challenging puzzle with hundreds of levels. Plan your pours carefully.
controls: Tap a tube to pick up liquid, tap another to pour. Undo button available.

title: Stack Tower
description: Tap to stack blocks and build the tallest tower! Time your drops perfectly for PERFECT combos. Beautiful 3D isometric visuals.
controls: Tap or click to drop the block at the right moment.

title: Bubble Shooter
description: Aim and shoot colored bubbles to match 3 or more! Classic bubble shooter with satisfying chain reactions and wall-bounce trick shots.
controls: Aim with mouse/touch, tap or click to shoot. Match 3+ same-color bubbles.

title: Block Drop
description: Classic block-stacking puzzle! Arrange falling tetrominoes to clear lines. Speed increases as you level up. How long can you survive?
controls: Arrow keys or swipe to move. Tap or Up arrow to rotate. Swipe down for hard drop.
